text: I have a doctor's appointment that I completely forgot about until this morning.
I woke up with a splitting migraine and can't look at screens.
I think I have food poisoning from last night's dinner.
My back went out and I can barely move.
I have a severe allergic reaction and my face looks like a balloon.
I pulled a muscle sneezing — yes, that's a real thing.
My wisdom tooth is killing me and I need emergency dental care.
I have pink eye and don't want to spread it.
I have a 24-hour stomach bug and it's not pretty.
My vertigo is so bad the room won't stop spinning.
I have a kidney stone and the pain is unbearable.
I came down with a bad cold overnight.
My sinuses are completely blocked and I can't think straight.
I injured my wrist and can't type.
I have laryngitis and can't speak for any calls.
I stepped on a nail and need to get a tetanus shot.
I have a high fever and my doctor said to stay home.
I sprained my ankle and can't drive.
My blood pressure is dangerously high and I need rest.
I have a severe sore throat and suspect strep.
I have a rash that needs medical attention.
My asthma is acting up badly today.
I have a stomach ulcer flare-up.
I have a urinary tract infection and it's miserable.
I'm having heart palpitations and my doctor wants me monitored.
I have a pinched nerve in my neck.
My eczema is flaring and I can barely use my hands.
I have a hernia that's acting up.
I have severe period cramps that are debilitating today.
I have an ear infection and can't balance properly.
My diabetes is out of control and I need to rest.
I have a severe nosebleed that won't stop.
I have shingles and it's extremely painful.
My carpal tunnel is so bad I can't use a keyboard.
I have a bad case of sciatica today.
I have bronchitis and keep having coughing fits.
I have tendinitis in my shoulder.
I burned my hand cooking breakfast.
I need to go to urgent care — I'll explain later.
I cut my finger badly and needed stitches.
My kid is sick and I can't find anyone to watch them.
My babysitter cancelled at the last minute.
My elderly parent needs to go to the hospital.
There's a family emergency I can't discuss right now.
My spouse was rushed to the ER last night.
My child has a school event I completely forgot to put on the calendar.
My kid's school just called — they have a fever and I need to pick them up.
My mother flew in unexpectedly and I need to get her settled.
My child had a panic attack and I can't leave them alone.
My dog is really sick and needs emergency vet care.
My cat had kittens overnight — all 7 of them need attention.
My parent's caregiver didn't show up and I'm the backup.
My kid has a specialist appointment I can't reschedule.
My spouse just had surgery and was discharged early — I need to care for them.
My nephew is in town and needs someone to pick him up from the airport.
My parent fell and I need to assess if they're okay.
My child has a severe allergic reaction at school.
My family has a bereavement — a distant relative passed.
My parent's power of attorney paperwork needs to be signed today.
My child's daycare is closed for an emergency.
My teenager had an accident and needs me now.
My in-laws arrived a day early and chaos ensued.
My sibling is in crisis and I'm the only one they'll talk to.
My kid locked themselves in the bathroom and I'm waiting for a locksmith.
My spouse got into a minor car accident and I need to help.
My parent's medication was mixed up and I need to sort it out.
My child has an IEP meeting at school today.
My grandmother had a fall and is being evaluated.
My pet fish died and my kids are inconsolable.
My baby was up all night and I haven't slept at all.
My car won't start — battery is completely dead.
I got a flat tire on the way in.
I'm stuck in an unexpected traffic jam — the freeway is completely closed.
My train was cancelled with no warning.
I missed my bus and the next one isn't for an hour.
My car is at the mechanic unexpectedly.
I was in a minor fender-bender — no injuries but lots of paperwork.
My Uber driver cancelled and there are no cars available.
There's a fuel leak in my car and I can't drive it.
My bike tire popped on the way in.
A traffic accident ahead has traffic at a standstill for miles.
My car's check engine light came on and it's making a terrible noise.
My car got towed overnight — parking sign confusion.
The bridge on my route is closed for emergency repairs.
My windshield cracked and I can't see safely.
I ran out of gas — embarrassing but true.
There's a road washout on my only route.
My transmission just gave out.
A tree fell across my driveway overnight.
My alternator died and the car shut down mid-commute.
My public transit app shows no service today on my line.
I locked my keys in the car — waiting for roadside assistance.
There's a police checkpoint blocking my route.
My parking brake cable snapped and I can't move the car safely.
I have a cracked axle and the car is undriveable.

A sinkhole opened on my street.

My garage door is broken and my car is stuck inside.
I rear-ended someone slightly — everyone's fine but there's a report to file.
My pipes burst overnight and there's water everywhere.
I have a gas leak and the utility company is on their way.
My furnace died in the middle of the night.

My roof is leaking and I need to manage the damage.
My refrigerator stopped working and everything is spoiling.

My basement flooded.

My internet is completely out and I can't work from home.

There's a power outage in my neighborhood.
